title: MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
shortInfo: Mahanadi Coalfields (MCL) has released the official Medical Consultants Notification 2026 on the official website, mahanadicoal.in. A total of 53 vacancies have been announced under the MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 70 years with qualifications such as MBBS, PG Degree, DNB, or PG Diploma in the concerned specialty can apply online up to 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

basic_details.job_title: MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mahanadi Coalfields (MCL) has released the official Medical Consultants Notification 2026 on the official website, mahanadicoal.in. A total of 53 vacancies have been announced under the MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 70 years with qualifications such as MBBS, PG Degree, DNB, or PG Diploma in the concerned specialty can apply online up to 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 70 years of age during the contract period.
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 70 years for all posts during the contract period. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, PG Degree/DNB/PG Diploma in concerned specialty for Specialist. MBBS for GDMO.
qualification.details: Consultant (Medical Specialist): MBBS from a recognized Institute/College approved by the Medical Council of India/NMC along with a recognized Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Post Graduate Diploma in the concerned specialty. Retired Medical Executives need minimum "Good" ratings in the last 05 years of service, no punishment under CDA Rules in the last 05 years, and not involved in corruption/illegal gratification/criminal cases. Outside candidates require a minimum of 07 years of experience in the concerned specialization. Consultant (GDMO): MBBS from a recognized Institute/College approved by the Medical Council of India/NMC. Outside candidates should possess a minimum of 03 years of experience as GDMO.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consultant (Medical Specialist): ₹8,000/- per 3-hour session. Consultant (GDMO): ₹5,000/- per day.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MCL Medical Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Mahanadi Coalfields Limited (MCL) Medical Consultant posts is 11th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Consultants in MCL?
faq.answer: Mahanadi Coalfields Limited (MCL) has announced a total of 53 vacancies for Medical Consultant positions, including various specialties and General Duty Medical Officers (GDMOs).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for MCL Medical Consultant posts?
faq.answer: For Consultant (Medical Specialist) posts, candidates need an MBBS with a Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma in the concerned specialty. For Consultant (GDMO) posts, an MBBS degree is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to MCL Medical Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for all Medical Consultant posts in MCL is not more than 70 years of age during the contract period. Specific age relaxations are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for MCL Medical Consultant roles?
faq.answer: Consultant (Medical Specialist) will receive ₹8,000/- per 3-hour session, while Consultant (GDMO) will be paid ₹5,000/- per day.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for MCL Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for the MCL Medical Consultant positions through the online mode only. The application link is available on the official MCL website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MCL Medical Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The provided data does not mention any application fee for the MCL Medical Consultant recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any such details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for MCL Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for MCL Medical Consultant posts will involve the shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview or walk-in-interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the MCL Medical Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Medical Consultant positions at Mahanadi Coalfields Limited (MCL) are offered on a fixed tenure contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for MCL Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for MCL Medical Consultant recruitment can be found on the official website of Mahanadi Coalfields Limited (MCL). A direct link to the notification PDF is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment portals.
